prompt: Convert the following one-line user complaint into a Linear ticket body. Title, 2 sentences of context, 2 bullet acceptance criteria, suggested priority (Urgent|High|Medium|Low). Complaint: 'every time I push to a branch with an open PR, I have to remember to babysit CI manually and the agent keeps sleeping instead of starting a watcher.' Output as Markdown.

Summarize the following PR diff intent into a single release-note paragraph (3 sentences). Diff intent: 'Adds a Python script that scans docs/conversations/*.md for phrases recurring across 3+ sessions, co-locates them with failure-mode keywords + repetition acknowledgements, and surfaces them as P16 candidates. Includes a bash dispatcher, 14 canary assertions, and 6 fixture conversations.' Output as Markdown under a `## Release Note` header.

Match the following symptom to the correct bstack primitive (P1-P20) and explain in 1 sentence why. Symptom: 'After a substantial work session that produced new entity material, the agent declared work done without running the knowledge pipeline, so the next session started without those entities indexed.' Output format: 'Primitive: P<N> (<Name>). Reason: <1 sentence>.'
